safest_plan.entry_basis: zero_live grade — big demand/accumulation zone, chart labelled "$11/14" with 0.705 fib ~$13; mid of the $11-14 band (image)

targets.basis: red horizontal supply line + hand-drawn bounce target with two blue dots ~$18 (image)

safest_plan.stop_basis: below the $11-14 demand zone / 0.79 fib ~$11.8 — zero_live: "break and hold below big demand area on daily"

stance_by_source.summary: Wants to wait for a full drop back into the $11-14 buying zone; warns price may go lower first; only a partial setup, not an active buy here.

conflicts: Internal tension in the one source: the chart sketches a short bounce up to ~$18, but Zero's stated preference is to be patient and buy only on a deeper drop into the $11-14 zone — so the near-term bounce is not the actionable plan.
plain_english: XPeng is trading around $16.50. The only source here would rather wait for the price to fall back into its big buying zone around $11-14 before getting interested, and even warns it could dip below the recent low first. There's a rough sketch on the chart of a brief bounce up toward $18, but the trader's stated plan is to be patient and buy lower, not to chase it at the current price. Best move: wait — set alerts near $13 and only reconsider if it reaches the $11-14 zone.
